_comment: Debian/Ubuntu (WSL Ubuntu) package manifest. Owner: Tank.

_binary_quirks.bat: apt installs as 'bat' on Ubuntu 22.04+; on older systems the binary is 'batcat' — bootstrap/install.sh creates a ~/.local/bin/bat symlink automatically.
_binary_quirks.fd-find: apt installs as 'fd-find'; the binary is 'fdfind' — bootstrap/install.sh creates a ~/.local/bin/fd symlink automatically.
_binary_quirks.eza: Available in Ubuntu 23.10+ via apt. On older Ubuntu, install via the official eza apt repo (see bootstrap/install.sh) or cargo.
_binary_quirks.delta: Not in Ubuntu apt. Installed from GitHub releases by bootstrap/install.sh.
_binary_quirks.starship: Not in apt. Installed via the official install script: curl -sS https://starship.rs/install.sh | sh
_binary_quirks.zoxide: Available in Ubuntu 22.10+ via apt. On older systems, installed via the official script: curl -sS https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ajeetdsouza/zoxide/main/install.sh | bash
_binary_quirks.yq: mikefarah/yq is not in standard Ubuntu apt. Installed from GitHub releases by bootstrap/install.sh.

apt.name: build-essential
apt.description: C build tools (needed for some cargo installs)

apt.name: bat
apt.description: Syntax-highlighting cat; binary may be 'batcat' on older Ubuntu — see _binary_quirks

apt.name: fd-find
apt.description: Fast find replacement; binary is 'fdfind' on Debian/Ubuntu — see _binary_quirks

apt.name: eza
apt.description: Modern ls replacement; Ubuntu 23.10+, see _binary_quirks for older distros

apt.name: zoxide
apt.description: Frecency-based cd; Ubuntu 22.10+, see _binary_quirks for fallback script

script_installs.name: zoxide_fallback
script_installs.description: Fallback when apt version is too old
